import React, { useState,useRef } from 'react' import './css_comp/result_train.css' import Seat_selection from './seat_selection' export default function Result_train() { const showClassInfo=useRef(null) const train_info=useRef(null) const [show,setShow]=useState(false) function toogleShow(){ const class_info=showClassInfo.current if(!show){ class_info.style.maxHeight= `${class_info.scrollHeight}px` console.log(class_info.scrollHeight) } else{ class_info.style.maxHeight= `0px` } setShow(!show) } return (
toogleShow()}>
